chunks.title: Fall of Israel to Assyria
chunks.reason: Narrative account of Hoshea's reign and the capture of Samaria.

chunks.title: Reasons for Israel's Exile
chunks.reason: Theological explanation detailing Israel's sins and God's warnings.

chunks.title: Settlement of Foreign Nations
chunks.reason: Narrative of the new inhabitants arriving and their initial struggles.

chunks.title: Syncretism of New Inhabitants
chunks.reason: Description of the mixed worship practices and their persistence.
